title: Custom Action Fields

posts.author: WasayNoori (Wasay Noori)
posts.cookedHtml:
The Sentence location seems to have moved to Workflow blocks from recipes dialog.
I am building a recipe that says When Status changes, read from and . I just want to pass the ID’s of these columns to my URL.
How do I instruct Monday to grab the ID of the columns? per documentation, I am supposed to pass the KEY as well but now, the complete object is selected. Is the ID automatically passed?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @WasayNoori,

You can go to your custom trigger or action and in there, use an input field that is relevant to what you need. For example, if you want to pass the ID of a status column, you can add the input field “status column” with “recipe sentence” as the source. Then the user will have to select the relevant status column, and you will receive that selection (the ID of the selected column).

Is that what you need?

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias
